modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help adding content control in Word

full_description_text: 
I was trying to add a content control in Word but couldn't figure it out. I looked everywhere and just got confused. It's really important for my document, and I need it done fast.
short_description: Need help adding content control in Word
description: I was trying to add a content control in Word but couldn't figure it out. I looked everywhere and just got confused. It's really important for my document, and I need it done fast.
